\subsection{Prerequisites}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/ast_manipulation:prerequisites}}\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
PyCypher installed (see {\hyperref[\detokenize{getting_started::doc}]{\sphinxcrossref{\DUrole{doc}{Getting Started}}}})

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Familiarity with Cypher query syntax

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Basic knowledge of Pydantic models

\end{itemize}


\subsection{Overview}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/ast_manipulation:overview}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
PyCypher represents parsed Cypher queries as a tree of strongly\sphinxhyphen{}typed
\sphinxhref{https://docs.pydantic.dev/}{Pydantic} models defined in
{\hyperref[\detokenize{api/pycypher:module-pycypher.ast_models}]{\sphinxcrossref{\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{pycypher.ast\_models}}}}}.  Every element of the query — nodes, relationships,
expressions, clauses — has a corresponding Python class with validated fields.

\sphinxAtStartPar
The typical flow is:
\begin{enumerate}
\sphinxsetlistlabels{\arabic}{enumi}{enumii}{}{.}%
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Parse} a Cypher string with {\hyperref[\detokenize{api/pycypher:pycypher.grammar_parser.GrammarParser}]{\sphinxcrossref{\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{GrammarParser}}}}}

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Convert} the raw Lark tree to typed models with \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{ASTConverter}}

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Inspect or modify} the resulting AST using standard Python attribute access

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Traverse} the tree with {\hyperref[\detokenize{api/pycypher:pycypher.ast_models.ASTNode.traverse}]{\sphinxcrossref{\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{traverse()}}}}}

\end{enumerate}


\subsection{Parsing a Query to a Typed AST}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/ast_manipulation:parsing-a-query-to-a-typed-ast}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
The simplest way to get a typed AST from a Cypher string is the one\sphinxhyphen{}liner
{\hyperref[\detokenize{api/pycypher:pycypher.ast_converter.ASTConverter.from_cypher}]{\sphinxcrossref{\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{from\_cypher()}}}}}:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{ast\PYGZus{}models}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{ASTConverter}

\PYG{n}{typed\PYGZus{}ast} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{ASTConverter}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{from\PYGZus{}cypher}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{MATCH (n:Person) WHERE n.age \PYGZgt{} 30 RETURN n.name}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{n+nb}{print}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n+nb}{type}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{typed\PYGZus{}ast}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} \PYGZlt{}class \PYGZsq{}pycypher.ast\PYGZus{}models.Query\PYGZsq{}\PYGZgt{}}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
If you need access to the intermediate Lark parse tree (e.g. for custom
transformers or debugging), use the two\sphinxhyphen{}step flow instead:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{grammar\PYGZus{}parser}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{GrammarParser}
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{ast\PYGZus{}models}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{ASTConverter}

\PYG{n}{parser} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{GrammarParser}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{parse\PYGZus{}tree} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{parser}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{parse}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{MATCH (n:Person) WHERE n.age \PYGZgt{} 30 RETURN n.name}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{n}{converter} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{ASTConverter}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{typed\PYGZus{}ast} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{converter}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{convert}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{parser}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{transformer}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{transform}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{parse\PYGZus{}tree}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
The returned \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{Query}} object is the root of a fully validated tree.  Every
child node carries type information, making IDE auto\sphinxhyphen{}complete and static
analysis tools work out of the box.


\subsection{Creating AST Nodes from Scratch}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/ast_manipulation:creating-ast-nodes-from-scratch}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
You can construct AST nodes directly without parsing a string.  This is useful
for code\sphinxhyphen{}generation tools, query rewriters, and testing.


\subsubsection{Nodes and Labels}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/ast_manipulation:nodes-and-labels}}
\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{ast\PYGZus{}models}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{NodePattern}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{Variable}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} A node pattern: (p:Person)}
\PYG{n}{person} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{NodePattern}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{variable}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{Variable}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{name}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{p}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{labels}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Person}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n+nb}{print}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{person}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{variable}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{name}\PYG{p}{)}   \PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} \PYGZdq{}p\PYGZdq{}}
\PYG{n+nb}{print}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{person}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{labels}\PYG{p}{)}          \PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} [\PYGZdq{}Person\PYGZdq{}]}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} An anonymous node: ()}
\PYG{n}{anon} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{NodePattern}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n+nb}{print}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{anon}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{variable}\PYG{p}{)}          \PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} None}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsubsection{Relationship Patterns}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/ast_manipulation:relationship-patterns}}
\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{ast\PYGZus{}models}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{RelationshipPattern}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{RelationshipDirection}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{Variable}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} \PYGZhy{}[r:KNOWS]\PYGZhy{}\PYGZgt{}}
\PYG{n}{rel} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{RelationshipPattern}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{variable}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{Variable}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{name}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{r}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{rel\PYGZus{}types}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{KNOWS}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{direction}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{RelationshipDirection}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{RIGHT}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n+nb}{print}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{rel}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{direction}\PYG{p}{)}   \PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} RelationshipDirection.RIGHT}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsubsection{Expressions}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/ast_manipulation:expressions}}
\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{ast\PYGZus{}models}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{Arithmetic}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{Comparison}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{IntegerLiteral}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{PropertyLookup}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{Variable}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} n.age \PYGZgt{} 30}
\PYG{n}{predicate} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{Comparison}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{operator}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZgt{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{left}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{PropertyLookup}\PYG{p}{(}
        \PYG{n}{expression}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{Variable}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{name}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{n}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
        \PYG{n}{property\PYGZus{}name}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{age}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{right}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{IntegerLiteral}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{value}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{30}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} n.score + 10}
\PYG{n}{expr} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{Arithmetic}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{operator}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{+}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{left}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{PropertyLookup}\PYG{p}{(}
        \PYG{n}{expression}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{Variable}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{name}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{n}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
        \PYG{n}{property\PYGZus{}name}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{score}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{right}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{IntegerLiteral}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{value}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{10}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsection{Traversing the AST}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/ast_manipulation:traversing-the-ast}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Every \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{ASTNode}} subclass exposes a \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{traverse()}} iterator that yields
all nodes in the tree in depth\sphinxhyphen{}first order:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k}{for} \PYG{n}{node} \PYG{o+ow}{in} \PYG{n}{typed\PYGZus{}ast}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{traverse}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{:}
    \PYG{n+nb}{print}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+sa}{f}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+si}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{n}{node}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n+nv+vm}{\PYGZus{}\PYGZus{}class\PYGZus{}\PYGZus{}}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n+nv+vm}{\PYGZus{}\PYGZus{}name\PYGZus{}\PYGZus{}}\PYG{l+s+si}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
You can filter by type to find specific constructs:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{ast\PYGZus{}models}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{NodePattern}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{PropertyLookup}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Find all node patterns in the query}
\PYG{n}{node\PYGZus{}patterns} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{p}{[}
    \PYG{n}{n} \PYG{k}{for} \PYG{n}{n} \PYG{o+ow}{in} \PYG{n}{typed\PYGZus{}ast}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{traverse}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{k}{if} \PYG{n+nb}{isinstance}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{n}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{NodePattern}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{p}{]}
\PYG{n+nb}{print}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+sa}{f}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Found }\PYG{l+s+si}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{n+nb}{len}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{node\PYGZus{}patterns}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{l+s+si}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{ node pattern(s)}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Find all property lookups}
\PYG{n}{lookups} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{p}{[}
    \PYG{n}{n} \PYG{k}{for} \PYG{n}{n} \PYG{o+ow}{in} \PYG{n}{typed\PYGZus{}ast}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{traverse}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{k}{if} \PYG{n+nb}{isinstance}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{n}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{PropertyLookup}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{p}{]}
\PYG{k}{for} \PYG{n}{lk} \PYG{o+ow}{in} \PYG{n}{lookups}\PYG{p}{:}
    \PYG{n+nb}{print}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+sa}{f}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{  property: }\PYG{l+s+si}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{n}{lk}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{property\PYGZus{}name}\PYG{l+s+si}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsection{Pretty\sphinxhyphen{}Printing}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/ast_manipulation:pretty-printing}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
The \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{pretty()}} method produces a human\sphinxhyphen{}readable tree representation:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{n+nb}{print}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{typed\PYGZus{}ast}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{pretty}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
This is invaluable for debugging grammar changes and understanding how PyCypher
interprets a given Cypher string.


\subsection{Validation}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/ast_manipulation:validation}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Because every AST node is a Pydantic model, construction validates field types
automatically:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pydantic}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{ValidationError}
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{ast\PYGZus{}models}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{IntegerLiteral}

\PYG{k}{try}\PYG{p}{:}
    \PYG{n}{bad} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{IntegerLiteral}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{value}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{not\PYGZus{}a\PYGZus{}number}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{k}{except} \PYG{n}{ValidationError} \PYG{k}{as} \PYG{n}{e}\PYG{p}{:}
    \PYG{n+nb}{print}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{e}\PYG{p}{)}  \PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Pydantic reports the type mismatch}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
For semantic validation (undefined variables, aggregation rules, etc.) use
{\hyperref[\detokenize{api/pycypher:pycypher.semantic_validator.SemanticValidator}]{\sphinxcrossref{\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{SemanticValidator}}}}} — see the
{\hyperref[\detokenize{tutorials/query_validation::doc}]{\sphinxcrossref{\DUrole{doc}{Query Validation}}}} tutorial for details.


\subsection{Common AST Node Types}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/ast_manipulation:common-ast-node-types}}

\begin{savenotes}\sphinxattablestart
\sphinxthistablewithglobalstyle
\centering
\begin{tabulary}{\linewidth}[t]{TT}
\sphinxtoprule
\sphinxstyletheadfamily 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Class
&\sphinxstyletheadfamily 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Represents
\\
\sphinxmidrule
\sphinxtableatstartofbodyhook
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{Query}}
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
Top\sphinxhyphen{}level query (list of clauses)
\\
\sphinxhline
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{Match}}
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
MATCH clause with patterns and WHERE
\\
\sphinxhline

&
\sphinxAtStartPar
RETURN clause with items and modifiers
\\
\sphinxhline

\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{With}}
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
WITH clause (projection between pipeline stages)
\\
\sphinxhline

\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{NodePattern}}
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{(var:Label \{props\})}}
\\

&

&
\sphinxAtStartPar

\\

&

\\

&

Named variable reference

&

Integer constant

\section{Data ETL Pipeline}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/data_etl_pipeline:data-etl-pipeline}}\label{\detokenize{tutorials/data_etl_pipeline::doc}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Build end\sphinxhyphen{}to\sphinxhyphen{}end ETL pipelines that load data from files or databases,
transform it with Cypher queries, and write results to output sinks — using
PyCypher’s ingestion layer and the \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{nmetl}} CLI.

\begin{sphinxcontents}
\sphinxstylecontentstitle{In this tutorial}

\subsection{Prerequisites}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/data_etl_pipeline:prerequisites}}\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
PyCypher installed (see {\hyperref[\detokenize{getting_started::doc}]{\sphinxcrossref{\DUrole{doc}{Getting Started}}}})

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Sample CSV or Parquet files to work with

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Basic understanding of Cypher queries

\end{itemize}


\subsection{Overview}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/data_etl_pipeline:overview}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
PyCypher ships with a lightweight ETL framework built around three concepts:
\begin{enumerate}
\sphinxsetlistlabels{\arabic}{enumi}{enumii}{}{.}%
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Data sources} — load entities and relationships from files, DataFrames,
or SQL databases

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Cypher queries} — transform, filter, and aggregate the loaded graph data

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Output sinks} — write query results to files or external systems

\end{enumerate}

\sphinxAtStartPar
You can drive pipelines \sphinxstylestrong{programmatically} via {\hyperref[\detokenize{api/pycypher:pycypher.ingestion.context_builder.ContextBuilder}]{\sphinxcrossref{\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{ContextBuilder}}}}}
or \sphinxstylestrong{declaratively} via a YAML config file and the \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{nmetl}} CLI.


\subsection{Programmatic Pipeline}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/data_etl_pipeline:programmatic-pipeline}}

\subsubsection{Loading Data with ContextBuilder}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/data_etl_pipeline:loading-data-with-contextbuilder}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
The {\hyperref[\detokenize{api/pycypher:pycypher.ingestion.context_builder.ContextBuilder}]{\sphinxcrossref{\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{ContextBuilder}}}}} provides a
fluent API for assembling a query context:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{ingestion}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{context\PYGZus{}builder}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{ContextBuilder}
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{star}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{Star}

\PYG{n}{context} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{ContextBuilder}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{add\PYGZus{}entity}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Person}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{people.csv}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{id\PYGZus{}col}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{person\PYGZus{}id}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{add\PYGZus{}entity}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Company}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{companies.csv}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{id\PYGZus{}col}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{company\PYGZus{}id}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{add\PYGZus{}relationship}\PYG{p}{(}
        \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{WORKS\PYGZus{}AT}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
        \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{employment.csv}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
        \PYG{n}{source\PYGZus{}col}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{person\PYGZus{}id}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
        \PYG{n}{target\PYGZus{}col}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{company\PYGZus{}id}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{build}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{n}{star} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{Star}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{result} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{star}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{execute\PYGZus{}query}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{MATCH (p:Person)\PYGZhy{}[:WORKS\PYGZus{}AT]\PYGZhy{}\PYGZgt{}(c:Company) }\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}
    \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{RETURN p.name AS employee, c.name AS company}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
The \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{source}} argument accepts:
\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{File paths}: CSV, Parquet, or JSON (local or remote via \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{s3://}}, \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{https://}})

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{pandas DataFrames}: for data already in memory

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{PyArrow Tables}: for zero\sphinxhyphen{}copy Arrow integration

\end{itemize}


\subsubsection{Quick Setup from a Dict}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/data_etl_pipeline:quick-setup-from-a-dict}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
For the simplest case — DataFrames keyed by entity type:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{import}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pandas}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{as}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pd}
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{ingestion}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{context\PYGZus{}builder}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{ContextBuilder}

\PYG{n}{context} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{ContextBuilder}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{from\PYGZus{}dict}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}
    \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Person}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n}{pd}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{DataFrame}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}
        \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZus{}\PYGZus{}ID\PYGZus{}\PYGZus{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{2}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{3}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{p}{,}
        \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{name}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Alice}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Bob}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Carol}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{p}{,}
        \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{age}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+m+mi}{30}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{25}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{35}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Company}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n}{pd}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{DataFrame}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}
        \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZus{}\PYGZus{}ID\PYGZus{}\PYGZus{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+m+mi}{10}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{20}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{p}{,}
        \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{name}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Acme}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Globex}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsubsection{Supported Data Sources}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/data_etl_pipeline:supported-data-sources}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
The {\hyperref[\detokenize{api/pycypher:pycypher.ingestion.data_sources.data_source_from_uri}]{\sphinxcrossref{\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{data\_source\_from\_uri()}}}}} factory
resolves the correct reader based on URI scheme and file extension:


\begin{savenotes}\sphinxattablestart
\sphinxthistablewithglobalstyle
\centering
\begin{tabulary}{\linewidth}[t]{TT}
\sphinxtoprule
\sphinxstyletheadfamily 
\sphinxAtStartPar
URI pattern
&\sphinxstyletheadfamily 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Reader
\\
\sphinxmidrule
\sphinxtableatstartofbodyhook
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{/path/file.csv}}, \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{file:///…}}
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
CSV via DuckDB
\\
\sphinxhline
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{/path/file.parquet}}
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
Parquet via DuckDB
\\
\sphinxhline
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{/path/file.json}}
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
JSON via DuckDB
\\
\sphinxhline
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{s3://}}, \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{gs://}}, \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{https://}}
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
Remote file via DuckDB
\\
\sphinxhline
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{postgresql://}}, \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{mysql://}}, etc.
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
SQL query
\\
\sphinxbottomrule
\end{tabulary}
\sphinxtableafterendhook\par
\sphinxattableend\end{savenotes}

\sphinxAtStartPar
SQL sources require a \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{query}} parameter:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{n}{context} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{ContextBuilder}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{add\PYGZus{}entity}\PYG{p}{(}
        \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Person}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
        \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{postgresql://localhost/mydb}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
        \PYG{n}{query}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{SELECT id, name, age FROM people}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
        \PYG{n}{id\PYGZus{}col}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{id}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{build}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsection{YAML Configuration}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/data_etl_pipeline:yaml-configuration}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
For repeatable pipelines, define the entire ETL in a YAML file and run it
with the \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{nmetl}} CLI.


\subsubsection{Config File Structure}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/data_etl_pipeline:config-file-structure}}
\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} pipeline.yaml}
\PYG{n+nt}{entities}\PYG{p}{:}
\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{p+pIndicator}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nt}{type}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{Person}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n+nt}{uri}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{data/people.csv}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n+nt}{id\PYGZus{}col}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{person\PYGZus{}id}

\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{p+pIndicator}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nt}{type}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{Company}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n+nt}{uri}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{data/companies.parquet}

\PYG{n+nt}{relationships}\PYG{p}{:}
\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{p+pIndicator}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nt}{type}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{WORKS\PYGZus{}AT}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n+nt}{uri}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{data/employment.csv}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n+nt}{source\PYGZus{}col}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{person\PYGZus{}id}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n+nt}{target\PYGZus{}col}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{company\PYGZus{}id}

\PYG{n+nt}{queries}\PYG{p}{:}
\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{p+pIndicator}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nt}{name}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{employee\PYGZus{}report}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n+nt}{cypher}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{p+pIndicator}{|}
\PYG{+w}{      }\PYG{n+no}{MATCH (p:Person)\PYGZhy{}[:WORKS\PYGZus{}AT]\PYGZhy{}\PYGZgt{}(c:Company)}
\PYG{+w}{      }\PYG{n+no}{WHERE p.age \PYGZgt{}= 30}
\PYG{+w}{      }\PYG{n+no}{RETURN p.name AS employee, c.name AS company, p.age AS age}
\PYG{+w}{      }\PYG{n+no}{ORDER BY p.age DESC}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n+nt}{output}\PYG{p}{:}
\PYG{+w}{      }\PYG{n+nt}{uri}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{output/senior\PYGZus{}employees.csv}

\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{p+pIndicator}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nt}{name}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{company\PYGZus{}headcount}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n+nt}{cypher}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{p+pIndicator}{|}
\PYG{+w}{      }\PYG{n+no}{MATCH (p:Person)\PYGZhy{}[:WORKS\PYGZus{}AT]\PYGZhy{}\PYGZgt{}(c:Company)}
\PYG{+w}{      }\PYG{n+no}{RETURN c.name AS company, count(p) AS headcount}
\PYG{+w}{      }\PYG{n+no}{ORDER BY headcount DESC}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n+nt}{output}\PYG{p}{:}
\PYG{+w}{      }\PYG{n+nt}{uri}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{output/headcount.parquet}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsubsection{Environment Variables}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/data_etl_pipeline:environment-variables}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
YAML values support \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{\$\{VAR\_NAME\}}} placeholders that are substituted from
the process environment:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{n+nt}{entities}\PYG{p}{:}
\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{p+pIndicator}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nt}{type}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{Person}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n+nt}{uri}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{\PYGZdl{}\PYGZob{}DATA\PYGZus{}DIR\PYGZcb{}/people.csv}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsection{The \sphinxstyleliteralintitle{\sphinxupquote{nmetl}} CLI}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/data_etl_pipeline:the-nmetl-cli}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
The \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{nmetl}} command\sphinxhyphen{}line tool runs pipelines from YAML configs:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Run a pipeline}
uv\PYG{+w}{ }run\PYG{+w}{ }nmetl\PYG{+w}{ }run\PYG{+w}{ }pipeline.yaml

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Validate config without running}
uv\PYG{+w}{ }run\PYG{+w}{ }nmetl\PYG{+w}{ }validate\PYG{+w}{ }pipeline.yaml

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} List all queries in the config}
uv\PYG{+w}{ }run\PYG{+w}{ }nmetl\PYG{+w}{ }list\PYGZhy{}queries\PYG{+w}{ }pipeline.yaml

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Dry\PYGZhy{}run: show what would be executed}
uv\PYG{+w}{ }run\PYG{+w}{ }nmetl\PYG{+w}{ }run\PYG{+w}{ }pipeline.yaml\PYG{+w}{ }\PYGZhy{}\PYGZhy{}dry\PYGZhy{}run
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsubsection{Error Handling}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/data_etl_pipeline:error-handling}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
The CLI translates common errors into user\sphinxhyphen{}friendly messages:
\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{File not found} — reports the missing path

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Permission denied} — reports the access error

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Parse errors} — shows the line and column of the syntax issue

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Validation errors} — lists all config problems before attempting to run

\end{itemize}


\subsection{Writing Output}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/data_etl_pipeline:writing-output}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Query results can be written to CSV, Parquet, or JSON files via
{\hyperref[\detokenize{api/pycypher:pycypher.ingestion.output_writer.write_dataframe_to_uri}]{\sphinxcrossref{\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{write\_dataframe\_to\_uri()}}}}}:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{ingestion}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{write\PYGZus{}dataframe\PYGZus{}to\PYGZus{}uri}

\PYG{n}{write\PYGZus{}dataframe\PYGZus{}to\PYGZus{}uri}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{result\PYGZus{}dataframe}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{output/results.csv}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{write\PYGZus{}dataframe\PYGZus{}to\PYGZus{}uri}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{result\PYGZus{}dataframe}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{output/results.parquet}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
The output format is inferred from the file extension (\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{.csv}}, \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{.parquet}},
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{.json}}).  Parent directories are created automatically.


\subsection{Security}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/data_etl_pipeline:security}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
The ingestion layer includes built\sphinxhyphen{}in security checks
({\hyperref[\detokenize{api/pycypher:module-pycypher.ingestion.security}]{\sphinxcrossref{\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{pycypher.ingestion.security}}}}}):
\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Path traversal prevention} — file paths are sanitized to block \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{../}}
escape attempts

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{SQL injection protection} — SQL queries passed to data sources are
validated against injection patterns

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{URI scheme validation} — only recognised schemes are accepted

\end{itemize}


\subsection{Complete Example}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/data_etl_pipeline:complete-example}}
\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{import}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pandas}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{as}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pd}
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{ingestion}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{context\PYGZus{}builder}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{ContextBuilder}
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{star}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{Star}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} 1. Load data}
\PYG{n}{people} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{pd}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{DataFrame}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}
    \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZus{}\PYGZus{}ID\PYGZus{}\PYGZus{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{2}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{3}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{name}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Alice}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Bob}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Carol}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{dept}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Eng}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Sales}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Eng}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{knows} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{pd}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{DataFrame}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}
    \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZus{}\PYGZus{}SOURCE\PYGZus{}\PYGZus{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{2}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZus{}\PYGZus{}TARGET\PYGZus{}\PYGZus{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{3}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{n}{context} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{ContextBuilder}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{add\PYGZus{}entity}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Person}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{people}\PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{add\PYGZus{}relationship}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{KNOWS}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{knows}\PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{build}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} 2. Query}
\PYG{n}{star} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{Star}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{result} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{star}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{execute\PYGZus{}query}\PYG{p}{(}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{l+s+sd}{\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{    MATCH (p:Person)\PYGZhy{}[:KNOWS]\PYGZhy{}\PYGZgt{}(f:Person)}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{    RETURN p.name AS person, f.name AS friend, p.dept AS dept}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{    \PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}}
\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n+nb}{print}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{result}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} 3. Aggregate}
\PYG{n}{headcount} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{star}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{execute\PYGZus{}query}\PYG{p}{(}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{l+s+sd}{\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{    MATCH (p:Person)}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{    RETURN p.dept AS department, count(p) AS n}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{    ORDER BY n DESC}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{    \PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}}
\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n+nb}{print}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{headcount}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\subsection{Prerequisites}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/integration_guide:prerequisites}}\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
PyCypher installed (see {\hyperref[\detokenize{getting_started::doc}]{\sphinxcrossref{\DUrole{doc}{Getting Started}}}})

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Completed {\hyperref[\detokenize{tutorials/basic_query_parsing::doc}]{\sphinxcrossref{\DUrole{doc}{Basic Query Execution}}}} and {\hyperref[\detokenize{tutorials/graph_modeling::doc}]{\sphinxcrossref{\DUrole{doc}{Graph Modeling}}}}

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Familiarity with your target integration (Flask/FastAPI, Jupyter, etc.)

\end{itemize}


\subsection{Core Integration Pattern}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/integration_guide:core-integration-pattern}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Every PyCypher integration follows the same three steps:
\begin{enumerate}
\sphinxsetlistlabels{\arabic}{enumi}{enumii}{}{.}%
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Build a Context} — load data once

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Create a Star executor} — reuse across queries

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Execute queries} — return DataFrames

\end{enumerate}

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{Star}
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{ingestion}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{ContextBuilder}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Step 1: Build context (once, at startup)}
\PYG{n}{context} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{ContextBuilder}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{from\PYGZus{}dict}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}
    \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Person}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n}{people\PYGZus{}df}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{KNOWS}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n}{knows\PYGZus{}df}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Step 2: Create executor (reusable)}
\PYG{n}{star} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{Star}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Step 3: Execute queries (as many as needed)}
\PYG{n}{result} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{star}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{execute\PYGZus{}query}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{MATCH (p:Person) RETURN p.name AS name}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
The \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{Star}} instance caches parsed ASTs and query results internally.
Create it once and reuse it.


\subsection{Web API Integration}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/integration_guide:web-api-integration}}

\subsubsection{Flask Example}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/integration_guide:flask-example}}
\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{flask}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{Flask}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{jsonify}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{request}
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{Star}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{QueryTimeoutError}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{VariableNotFoundError}
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{ingestion}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{ContextBuilder}

\PYG{n}{app} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{Flask}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n+nv+vm}{\PYGZus{}\PYGZus{}name\PYGZus{}\PYGZus{}}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Build context at startup}
\PYG{n}{context} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{ContextBuilder}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{from\PYGZus{}dict}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{load\PYGZus{}your\PYGZus{}data}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{star} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{Star}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{n+nd}{@app}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{route}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{/query}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{methods}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{POST}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{k}{def}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nf}{run\PYGZus{}query}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{:}
    \PYG{n}{query} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{request}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{json}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{get}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{query}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{n}{params} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{request}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{json}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{get}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{parameters}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{p}{)}

    \PYG{k}{try}\PYG{p}{:}
        \PYG{n}{result} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{star}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{execute\PYGZus{}query}\PYG{p}{(}
            \PYG{n}{query}\PYG{p}{,}
            \PYG{n}{parameters}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{params}\PYG{p}{,}
            \PYG{n}{timeout\PYGZus{}seconds}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mf}{5.0}\PYG{p}{,}
        \PYG{p}{)}
        \PYG{k}{return} \PYG{n}{jsonify}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}
            \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{columns}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n}{result}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{columns}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{tolist}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
            \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{rows}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n}{result}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{values}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{tolist}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
            \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{count}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n+nb}{len}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{result}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
        \PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{k}{except} \PYG{n}{QueryTimeoutError}\PYG{p}{:}
        \PYG{k}{return} \PYG{n}{jsonify}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{error}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Query timed out}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{408}
    \PYG{k}{except} \PYG{n}{VariableNotFoundError} \PYG{k}{as} \PYG{n}{e}\PYG{p}{:}
        \PYG{k}{return} \PYG{n}{jsonify}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{error}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n+nb}{str}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{e}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{400}
    \PYG{k}{except} \PYG{n+ne}{Exception} \PYG{k}{as} \PYG{n}{e}\PYG{p}{:}
        \PYG{k}{return} \PYG{n}{jsonify}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{error}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n+nb}{str}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{e}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{500}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsubsection{FastAPI Example}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/integration_guide:fastapi-example}}
\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{fastapi}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{FastAPI}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{HTTPException}
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pydantic}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{BaseModel}
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{Star}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{QueryTimeoutError}
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{ingestion}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{ContextBuilder}

\PYG{n}{app} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{FastAPI}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{n}{context} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{ContextBuilder}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{from\PYGZus{}dict}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{load\PYGZus{}your\PYGZus{}data}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{star} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{Star}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{k}{class}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nc}{QueryRequest}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{BaseModel}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{:}
    \PYG{n}{query}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n+nb}{str}
    \PYG{n}{parameters}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n+nb}{dict} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}
    \PYG{n}{timeout}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n+nb}{float} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{l+m+mf}{5.0}

\PYG{n+nd}{@app}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{post}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{/query}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{k}{def}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nf}{run\PYGZus{}query}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{req}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n}{QueryRequest}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{:}
    \PYG{k}{try}\PYG{p}{:}
        \PYG{n}{result} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{star}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{execute\PYGZus{}query}\PYG{p}{(}
            \PYG{n}{req}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{query}\PYG{p}{,}
            \PYG{n}{parameters}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{req}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{parameters}\PYG{p}{,}
            \PYG{n}{timeout\PYGZus{}seconds}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{req}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{timeout}\PYG{p}{,}
        \PYG{p}{)}
        \PYG{k}{return} \PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{columns}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n}{result}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{columns}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{tolist}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{rows}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n}{result}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{to\PYGZus{}dict}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{records}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}
    \PYG{k}{except} \PYG{n}{QueryTimeoutError}\PYG{p}{:}
        \PYG{k}{raise} \PYG{n}{HTTPException}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+m+mi}{408}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Query timed out}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{k}{except} \PYG{n+ne}{Exception} \PYG{k}{as} \PYG{n}{e}\PYG{p}{:}
        \PYG{k}{raise} \PYG{n}{HTTPException}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+m+mi}{400}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n+nb}{str}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{e}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\begin{sphinxadmonition}{tip}{Tip:}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Always set \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{timeout\_seconds}} on user\sphinxhyphen{}facing endpoints to prevent
malicious or accidental resource exhaustion.
\end{sphinxadmonition}


\subsubsection{Query Parameters for Safety}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/integration_guide:query-parameters-for-safety}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Never interpolate user input into query strings.  Use query parameters:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} SAFE: parameterized query}
\PYG{n}{result} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{star}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{execute\PYGZus{}query}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{MATCH (p:Person) WHERE p.name = \PYGZdl{}name RETURN p.age AS age}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{parameters}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{name}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n}{user\PYGZus{}input}\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} UNSAFE: string interpolation — never do this}
\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} result = star.execute\PYGZus{}query(f\PYGZdq{}... WHERE p.name = \PYGZsq{}\PYGZob{}user\PYGZus{}input\PYGZcb{}\PYGZsq{} ...\PYGZdq{})}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
Parameters are bound safely before execution and support all Cypher types.


\subsection{Data Pipeline Integration}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/integration_guide:data-pipeline-integration}}

\subsubsection{Batch Processing}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/integration_guide:batch-processing}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Process data in stages, refreshing the context between batches:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{Star}
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{ingestion}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{ContextBuilder}

\PYG{k}{def}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nf}{process\PYGZus{}batch}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{batch\PYGZus{}df}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{:}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{l+s+sd}{\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}Process a single batch of incoming data.\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}}
    \PYG{n}{context} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{p}{(}
        \PYG{n}{ContextBuilder}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
        \PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{add\PYGZus{}entity}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Event}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{batch\PYGZus{}df}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{id\PYGZus{}col}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{event\PYGZus{}id}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
        \PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{add\PYGZus{}entity}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{User}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{users\PYGZus{}df}\PYG{p}{)}
        \PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{add\PYGZus{}relationship}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{TRIGGERED}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{triggered\PYGZus{}df}\PYG{p}{,}
                          \PYG{n}{source\PYGZus{}col}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{user\PYGZus{}id}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{target\PYGZus{}col}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{event\PYGZus{}id}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
        \PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{build}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{n}{star} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{Star}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{p}{)}

    \PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Aggregate and filter}
    \PYG{n}{result} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{star}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{execute\PYGZus{}query}\PYG{p}{(}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{l+s+sd}{\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{        MATCH (u:User)\PYGZhy{}[:TRIGGERED]\PYGZhy{}\PYGZgt{}(e:Event)}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{        WHERE e.severity = \PYGZsq{}critical\PYGZsq{}}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{        RETURN u.name AS user, count(e) AS critical\PYGZus{}events}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{        ORDER BY critical\PYGZus{}events DESC}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{        \PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}}
    \PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{k}{return} \PYG{n}{result}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Process each batch}
\PYG{k}{for} \PYG{n}{batch} \PYG{o+ow}{in} \PYG{n}{read\PYGZus{}batches}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{events/*.parquet}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{:}
    \PYG{n}{alerts} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{process\PYGZus{}batch}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{batch}\PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{k}{if} \PYG{n+nb}{len}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{alerts}\PYG{p}{)} \PYG{o}{\PYGZgt{}} \PYG{l+m+mi}{0}\PYG{p}{:}
        \PYG{n}{send\PYGZus{}alerts}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{alerts}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsubsection{Mutation Pipelines}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/integration_guide:mutation-pipelines}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Use Cypher write operations to transform data in\sphinxhyphen{}place:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Enrich nodes with computed properties}
\PYG{n}{star}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{execute\PYGZus{}query}\PYG{p}{(}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{l+s+sd}{\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{    MATCH (p:Person)\PYGZhy{}[:KNOWS]\PYGZhy{}\PYGZgt{}(friend:Person)}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{    WITH p, count(friend) AS friend\PYGZus{}count}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{    SET p.popularity = friend\PYGZus{}count}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{    \PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Create derived relationships}
\PYG{n}{star}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{execute\PYGZus{}query}\PYG{p}{(}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{l+s+sd}{\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{    MATCH (a:Person)\PYGZhy{}[:KNOWS]\PYGZhy{}\PYGZgt{}(b:Person)\PYGZhy{}[:KNOWS]\PYGZhy{}\PYGZgt{}(c:Person)}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{    WHERE NOT EXISTS \PYGZob{} MATCH (a)\PYGZhy{}[:KNOWS]\PYGZhy{}\PYGZgt{}(c) \PYGZcb{}}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{    AND a \PYGZlt{}\PYGZgt{} c}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{    CREATE (a)\PYGZhy{}[:FRIEND\PYGZus{}OF\PYGZus{}FRIEND]\PYGZhy{}\PYGZgt{}(c)}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{    \PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsubsection{YAML Pipeline with nmetl}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/integration_guide:yaml-pipeline-with-nmetl}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
For declarative pipelines, use the \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{nmetl}} CLI:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} pipeline.yaml}
\PYG{n+nt}{sources}\PYG{p}{:}
\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{n+nt}{Person}\PYG{p}{:}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n+nt}{type}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{csv}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n+nt}{path}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{data/people.csv}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n+nt}{id\PYGZus{}col}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{user\PYGZus{}id}
\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{n+nt}{KNOWS}\PYG{p}{:}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n+nt}{type}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{csv}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n+nt}{path}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{data/relationships.csv}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n+nt}{source\PYGZus{}col}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{from\PYGZus{}id}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n+nt}{target\PYGZus{}col}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{to\PYGZus{}id}

\PYG{n+nt}{queries}\PYG{p}{:}
\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{p+pIndicator}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nt}{name}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+lScalar+lScalarPlain}{popular\PYGZus{}people}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n+nt}{cypher}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{p+pIndicator}{|}
\PYG{+w}{      }\PYG{n+no}{MATCH (p:Person)\PYGZhy{}[:KNOWS]\PYGZhy{}\PYGZgt{}(f:Person)}
\PYG{+w}{      }\PYG{n+no}{RETURN p.name AS person, count(f) AS friends}
\PYG{+w}{      }\PYG{n+no}{ORDER BY friends DESC LIMIT 10}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
uv\PYG{+w}{ }run\PYG{+w}{ }nmetl\PYG{+w}{ }run\PYG{+w}{ }pipeline.yaml
uv\PYG{+w}{ }run\PYG{+w}{ }nmetl\PYG{+w}{ }query\PYG{+w}{ }pipeline.yaml\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}MATCH (p:Person) RETURN count(p)\PYGZdq{}}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
See {\hyperref[\detokenize{tutorials/data_etl_pipeline::doc}]{\sphinxcrossref{\DUrole{doc}{Data ETL Pipeline}}}} for the full YAML pipeline tutorial.


\subsection{Jupyter Notebook Integration}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/integration_guide:jupyter-notebook-integration}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
PyCypher returns pandas DataFrames, making it naturally compatible with
Jupyter’s display system:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} In a notebook cell:}
\PYG{k+kn}{import}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pandas}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{as}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pd}
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{Star}
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{ingestion}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{ContextBuilder}

\PYG{n}{context} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{ContextBuilder}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{from\PYGZus{}dict}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}
    \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Person}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n}{pd}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{read\PYGZus{}csv}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{people.csv}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{KNOWS}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n}{pd}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{read\PYGZus{}csv}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{relationships.csv}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{star} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{Star}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Display as a rich HTML table automatically}
\PYG{n}{star}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{execute\PYGZus{}query}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{MATCH (p:Person) RETURN p.name, p.age ORDER BY p.age}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
Combine with plotting libraries:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{import}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{matplotlib}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{pyplot}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{as}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{plt}

\PYG{n}{result} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{star}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{execute\PYGZus{}query}\PYG{p}{(}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{l+s+sd}{\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{    MATCH (p:Person)}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{    RETURN p.dept AS department, count(p) AS headcount}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{    ORDER BY headcount DESC}
\PYG{l+s+sd}{    \PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}}
\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{result}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{plot}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{bar}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{x}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{department}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{y}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{headcount}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{title}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Headcount by Department}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{plt}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{tight\PYGZus{}layout}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{plt}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{show}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsection{Pre\sphinxhyphen{}Execution Validation}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/integration_guide:pre-execution-validation}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
In multi\sphinxhyphen{}tenant or interactive systems, validate queries before execution
to provide fast user feedback:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{validate\PYGZus{}query}
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{semantic\PYGZus{}validator}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{ErrorSeverity}

\PYG{k}{def}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nf}{safe\PYGZus{}execute}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{star}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{query}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{o}{*}\PYG{o}{*}\PYG{n}{kwargs}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{:}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{l+s+sd}{\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}Validate, then execute.  Returns (result, errors).\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}}
    \PYG{n}{errors} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{validate\PYGZus{}query}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{query}\PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{n}{blocking} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{p}{[}\PYG{n}{e} \PYG{k}{for} \PYG{n}{e} \PYG{o+ow}{in} \PYG{n}{errors} \PYG{k}{if} \PYG{n}{e}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{severity} \PYG{o}{==} \PYG{n}{ErrorSeverity}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{ERROR}\PYG{p}{]}
    \PYG{k}{if} \PYG{n}{blocking}\PYG{p}{:}
        \PYG{k}{return} \PYG{k+kc}{None}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{p}{[}\PYG{n}{e}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{message} \PYG{k}{for} \PYG{n}{e} \PYG{o+ow}{in} \PYG{n}{blocking}\PYG{p}{]}
    \PYG{k}{return} \PYG{n}{star}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{execute\PYGZus{}query}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{query}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{o}{*}\PYG{o}{*}\PYG{n}{kwargs}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{p}{[}\PYG{p}{]}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
See {\hyperref[\detokenize{tutorials/query_validation::doc}]{\sphinxcrossref{\DUrole{doc}{Query Validation}}}} for the full validation tutorial.


\subsection{Error Handling Strategy}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/integration_guide:error-handling-strategy}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
PyCypher raises specific exception types.  Build your error handling
around them:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{Star}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{VariableNotFoundError}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{UnsupportedFunctionError}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{GraphTypeNotFoundError}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{QueryTimeoutError}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{QueryMemoryBudgetError}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{k}{def}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nf}{execute\PYGZus{}safely}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{star}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{query}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{o}{*}\PYG{o}{*}\PYG{n}{kwargs}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{:}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{l+s+sd}{\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}Execute with structured error handling.\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}\PYGZdq{}}
    \PYG{k}{try}\PYG{p}{:}
        \PYG{k}{return} \PYG{n}{star}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{execute\PYGZus{}query}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{query}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{o}{*}\PYG{o}{*}\PYG{n}{kwargs}\PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{k}{except} \PYG{n}{QueryTimeoutError} \PYG{k}{as} \PYG{n}{e}\PYG{p}{:}
        \PYG{n}{log}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{warning}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Timeout after }\PYG{l+s+si}{\PYGZpc{}.1f}\PYG{l+s+s2}{s: }\PYG{l+s+si}{\PYGZpc{}s}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{e}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{elapsed\PYGZus{}seconds}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{query}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{l+m+mi}{80}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{p}{)}
        \PYG{k}{raise}
    \PYG{k}{except} \PYG{n}{QueryMemoryBudgetError} \PYG{k}{as} \PYG{n}{e}\PYG{p}{:}
        \PYG{n}{log}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{warning}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Memory estimate }\PYG{l+s+si}{\PYGZpc{}d}\PYG{l+s+s2}{ MB exceeds budget}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{e}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{estimated\PYGZus{}bytes} \PYG{o}{/}\PYG{o}{/} \PYG{l+m+mf}{1e6}\PYG{p}{)}
        \PYG{k}{raise}
    \PYG{k}{except} \PYG{n}{VariableNotFoundError} \PYG{k}{as} \PYG{n}{e}\PYG{p}{:}
        \PYG{n}{log}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{info}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Undefined variable }\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZsq{}}\PYG{l+s+si}{\PYGZpc{}s}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZsq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{ (available: }\PYG{l+s+si}{\PYGZpc{}s}\PYG{l+s+s2}{)}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
                 \PYG{n}{e}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{variable\PYGZus{}name}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{e}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{available\PYGZus{}variables}\PYG{p}{)}
        \PYG{k}{raise}
    \PYG{k}{except} \PYG{n}{GraphTypeNotFoundError} \PYG{k}{as} \PYG{n}{e}\PYG{p}{:}
        \PYG{n}{log}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{info}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Unknown entity type }\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZsq{}}\PYG{l+s+si}{\PYGZpc{}s}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZsq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{e}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{type\PYGZus{}name}\PYG{p}{)}
        \PYG{k}{raise}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsection{Context Refresh}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/integration_guide:context-refresh}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
When your source data changes, rebuild the context.  The \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{Star}} executor
itself is stateless (beyond caches):

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Periodic refresh}
\PYG{k}{def}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nf}{refresh\PYGZus{}context}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{:}
    \PYG{n}{new\PYGZus{}context} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{ContextBuilder}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{from\PYGZus{}dict}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{load\PYGZus{}latest\PYGZus{}data}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{k}{return} \PYG{n}{Star}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{new\PYGZus{}context}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Use in a long\PYGZhy{}running service}
\PYG{n}{star} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{refresh\PYGZus{}context}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{schedule}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{every}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+m+mi}{10}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{minutes}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{do}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{k}{lambda}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n}{star} \PYG{o}{:=} \PYG{n}{refresh\PYGZus{}context}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
For append\sphinxhyphen{}only data, use mutation queries (\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{CREATE}}, \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{MERGE}}) to
add data without rebuilding the full context.


\subsection{Production Checklist}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/integration_guide:production-checklist}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Before deploying PyCypher in production:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
[ ] Set PYCYPHER\PYGZus{}QUERY\PYGZus{}TIMEOUT\PYGZus{}S to prevent runaway queries
[ ] Set PYCYPHER\PYGZus{}MAX\PYGZus{}CROSS\PYGZus{}JOIN\PYGZus{}ROWS to limit Cartesian explosions
[ ] Use query parameters (never string interpolation)
[ ] Validate untrusted queries before execution
[ ] Handle all exception types in your error handler
[ ] Size the result cache for your workload
[ ] Monitor query metrics via shared.metrics.QUERY\PYGZus{}METRICS
[ ] Bound variable\PYGZhy{}length paths in user\PYGZhy{}facing queries
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
See {\hyperref[\detokenize{user_guide/performance_tuning::doc}]{\sphinxcrossref{\DUrole{doc}{Performance Tuning}}}} for detailed tuning guidance
and {\hyperref[\detokenize{deployment/index::doc}]{\sphinxcrossref{\DUrole{doc}{Deployment \& Scaling}}}} for container deployment.

\subsection{Prerequisites}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/production_deployment:prerequisites}}\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
PyCypher installed (see {\hyperref[\detokenize{getting_started::doc}]{\sphinxcrossref{\DUrole{doc}{Getting Started}}}})

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Completed {\hyperref[\detokenize{tutorials/basic_query_parsing::doc}]{\sphinxcrossref{\DUrole{doc}{Basic Query Execution}}}} and {\hyperref[\detokenize{tutorials/integration_guide::doc}]{\sphinxcrossref{\DUrole{doc}{Integration Guide}}}}

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Familiarity with environment variable configuration

\end{itemize}


\subsection{Backend Selection}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/production_deployment:backend-selection}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
PyCypher supports pluggable DataFrame backends.  Choose a backend based on
your workload characteristics:


\begin{savenotes}\sphinxattablestart
\sphinxthistablewithglobalstyle
\centering
\begin{tabular}[t]{\X{20}{100}\X{40}{100}\X{40}{100}}
\sphinxtoprule
\sphinxstyletheadfamily 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Backend
&\sphinxstyletheadfamily 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Best for
&\sphinxstyletheadfamily 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Trade\sphinxhyphen{}offs
\\
\sphinxmidrule
\sphinxtableatstartofbodyhook
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{pandas}} (default)
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
Small\sphinxhyphen{}medium datasets, prototyping
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
Lowest startup cost, widest compatibility
\\
\sphinxhline
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{duckdb}}
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
Large datasets, analytical queries
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
2\sphinxhyphen{}10x faster joins/aggregations, higher memory efficiency
\\
\sphinxhline
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{polars}}
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
CPU\sphinxhyphen{}bound transformations
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
Fast columnar operations, requires polars dependency
\\
\sphinxbottomrule
\end{tabular}
\sphinxtableafterendhook\par
\sphinxattableend\end{savenotes}

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{Star}
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{ingestion}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{ContextBuilder}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Auto\PYGZhy{}select best available backend}
\PYG{n}{context} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{ContextBuilder}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{from\PYGZus{}dict}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Person}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n}{people\PYGZus{}df}\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{build}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{backend}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{auto}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Explicitly choose DuckDB for analytical workloads}
\PYG{n}{context} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{ContextBuilder}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{from\PYGZus{}dict}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Person}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n}{people\PYGZus{}df}\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{build}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{backend}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{duckdb}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{n}{star} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{Star}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n+nb}{print}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+sa}{f}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Using backend: }\PYG{l+s+si}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{backend\PYGZus{}name}\PYG{l+s+si}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsection{Rate Limiting}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/production_deployment:rate-limiting}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Protect shared deployments from query abuse with the built\sphinxhyphen{}in rate limiter.
Rate limiting is off by default and activated via environment variables:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Allow 50 queries/second with bursts up to 100}
\PYG{n+nb}{export}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nv}{PYCYPHER\PYGZus{}RATE\PYGZus{}LIMIT\PYGZus{}QPS}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m}{50}
\PYG{n+nb}{export}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nv}{PYCYPHER\PYGZus{}RATE\PYGZus{}LIMIT\PYGZus{}BURST}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m}{100}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
For programmatic control, create a custom limiter:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{rate\PYGZus{}limiter}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{QueryRateLimiter}
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{RateLimitError}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Per\PYGZhy{}user rate limiting in a web application}
\PYG{n}{user\PYGZus{}limiters} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}

\PYG{k}{def}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nf}{get\PYGZus{}user\PYGZus{}limiter}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{user\PYGZus{}id}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n+nb}{str}\PYG{p}{)} \PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{o}{\PYGZgt{}} \PYG{n}{QueryRateLimiter}\PYG{p}{:}
    \PYG{k}{if} \PYG{n}{user\PYGZus{}id} \PYG{o+ow}{not} \PYG{o+ow}{in} \PYG{n}{user\PYGZus{}limiters}\PYG{p}{:}
        \PYG{n}{user\PYGZus{}limiters}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{n}{user\PYGZus{}id}\PYG{p}{]} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{QueryRateLimiter}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{qps}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mf}{10.0}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{burst}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{20}\PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{k}{return} \PYG{n}{user\PYGZus{}limiters}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{n}{user\PYGZus{}id}\PYG{p}{]}

\PYG{k}{def}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nf}{handle\PYGZus{}query}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{user\PYGZus{}id}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n+nb}{str}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{query}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n+nb}{str}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{:}
    \PYG{k}{try}\PYG{p}{:}
        \PYG{n}{get\PYGZus{}user\PYGZus{}limiter}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{user\PYGZus{}id}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{acquire}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
        \PYG{k}{return} \PYG{n}{star}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{execute\PYGZus{}query}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{query}\PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{k}{except} \PYG{n}{RateLimitError}\PYG{p}{:}
        \PYG{k}{raise} \PYG{n}{HTTPError}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+m+mi}{429}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Too many queries — try again shortly}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsection{Audit Logging}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/production_deployment:audit-logging}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Enable structured query audit logging for compliance, debugging, and
performance monitoring.

\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Quick start} — enable via environment variable:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{n+nb}{export}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nv}{PYCYPHER\PYGZus{}AUDIT\PYGZus{}LOG}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m}{1}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
Each query emits a JSON record to the \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{pycypher.audit}} logger:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}
\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{n+nt}{\PYGZdq{}query\PYGZus{}id\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}a1b2c3d4\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{n+nt}{\PYGZdq{}timestamp\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}2026\PYGZhy{}03\PYGZhy{}30T12:00:00Z\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{n+nt}{\PYGZdq{}query\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}MATCH (p:Person) WHERE p.age \PYGZgt{} 25 RETURN p.name\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{n+nt}{\PYGZdq{}status\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}ok\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{n+nt}{\PYGZdq{}elapsed\PYGZus{}ms\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+m+mf}{12.3}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{n+nt}{\PYGZdq{}rows\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+m+mi}{42}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{n+nt}{\PYGZdq{}parameter\PYGZus{}keys\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{p}{[]}
\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Production configuration} — route audit logs to a file:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{import}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{logging}

\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{audit}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{enable\PYGZus{}audit\PYGZus{}log}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Enable audit logging}
\PYG{n}{enable\PYGZus{}audit\PYGZus{}log}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Route to a dedicated file}
\PYG{n}{audit\PYGZus{}logger} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{logging}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{getLogger}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{pycypher.audit}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{handler} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{logging}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{FileHandler}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{/var/log/pycypher/audit.jsonl}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{audit\PYGZus{}logger}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{addHandler}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{handler}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{audit\PYGZus{}logger}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{setLevel}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{logging}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{INFO}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Security note}: parameter \sphinxstyleemphasis{values} and result data are never logged.
Query text is truncated to prevent unbounded log growth.


\subsection{Timeouts and Memory Budgets}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/production_deployment:timeouts-and-memory-budgets}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Always set timeouts and memory budgets in production to prevent runaway
queries from consuming all resources:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{Star}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{QueryTimeoutError}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{QueryMemoryBudgetError}

\PYG{n}{star} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{Star}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{k}{try}\PYG{p}{:}
    \PYG{n}{result} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{star}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{execute\PYGZus{}query}\PYG{p}{(}
        \PYG{n}{user\PYGZus{}query}\PYG{p}{,}
        \PYG{n}{timeout\PYGZus{}seconds}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mf}{10.0}\PYG{p}{,}
        \PYG{n}{memory\PYGZus{}budget\PYGZus{}bytes}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{500} \PYG{o}{*} \PYG{l+m+mi}{1024} \PYG{o}{*} \PYG{l+m+mi}{1024}\PYG{p}{,}  \PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} 500 MB}
    \PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{k}{except} \PYG{n}{QueryTimeoutError} \PYG{k}{as} \PYG{n}{e}\PYG{p}{:}
    \PYG{n}{log}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{warning}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+sa}{f}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Query timed out after }\PYG{l+s+si}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{n}{e}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{elapsed\PYGZus{}seconds}\PYG{l+s+si}{:}\PYG{l+s+s2}{.1f}\PYG{l+s+si}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{s}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{k}{except} \PYG{n}{QueryMemoryBudgetError} \PYG{k}{as} \PYG{n}{e}\PYG{p}{:}
    \PYG{n}{log}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{warning}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+sa}{f}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Estimated }\PYG{l+s+si}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{n}{e}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{estimated\PYGZus{}bytes}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{/}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+m+mf}{1e6}\PYG{l+s+si}{:}\PYG{l+s+s2}{.0f}\PYG{l+s+si}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{MB exceeds budget}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
Or set defaults via environment variables:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{n+nb}{export}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nv}{PYCYPHER\PYGZus{}QUERY\PYGZus{}TIMEOUT\PYGZus{}S}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m}{30}
\PYG{n+nb}{export}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nv}{PYCYPHER\PYGZus{}MAX\PYGZus{}CROSS\PYGZus{}JOIN\PYGZus{}ROWS}\PYG{o}{=}1\PYGZus{}000\PYGZus{}000
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsection{Result Caching}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/production_deployment:result-caching}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
PyCypher caches query results automatically.  Tune cache size and TTL
for your workload:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Large cache with 5\PYGZhy{}minute TTL for analytical dashboards}
\PYG{n}{star} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{Star}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{context}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{result\PYGZus{}cache\PYGZus{}max\PYGZus{}mb}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{500}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{result\PYGZus{}cache\PYGZus{}ttl\PYGZus{}seconds}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mf}{300.0}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Disable caching for mutation\PYGZhy{}heavy workloads}
\PYG{n}{star} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{Star}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{context}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{result\PYGZus{}cache\PYGZus{}max\PYGZus{}mb}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{0}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
Monitor cache effectiveness:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nn}{pycypher}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{get\PYGZus{}cache\PYGZus{}stats}

\PYG{n}{stats} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{get\PYGZus{}cache\PYGZus{}stats}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{star}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{star}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n+nb}{print}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+sa}{f}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Hit rate: }\PYG{l+s+si}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{n}{stats}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+s+s1}{\PYGZsq{}}\PYG{l+s+s1}{result\PYGZus{}cache\PYGZus{}hit\PYGZus{}rate}\PYG{l+s+s1}{\PYGZsq{}}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{l+s+si}{:}\PYG{l+s+s2}{.0\PYGZpc{}}\PYG{l+s+si}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n+nb}{print}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+sa}{f}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Size:     }\PYG{l+s+si}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{n}{stats}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+s+s1}{\PYGZsq{}}\PYG{l+s+s1}{result\PYGZus{}cache\PYGZus{}size\PYGZus{}mb}\PYG{l+s+s1}{\PYGZsq{}}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{l+s+si}{:}\PYG{l+s+s2}{.1f}\PYG{l+s+si}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{ MB}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsection{Complete Production Checklist}
\label{\detokenize{tutorials/production_deployment:complete-production-checklist}}
\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Resource protection}
\PYG{n+nb}{export}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nv}{PYCYPHER\PYGZus{}QUERY\PYGZus{}TIMEOUT\PYGZus{}S}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m}{30}
\PYG{n+nb}{export}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nv}{PYCYPHER\PYGZus{}MAX\PYGZus{}CROSS\PYGZus{}JOIN\PYGZus{}ROWS}\PYG{o}{=}1\PYGZus{}000\PYGZus{}000
\PYG{n+nb}{export}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nv}{PYCYPHER\PYGZus{}MAX\PYGZus{}UNBOUNDED\PYGZus{}PATH\PYGZus{}HOPS}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m}{10}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Caching}
\PYG{n+nb}{export}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nv}{PYCYPHER\PYGZus{}RESULT\PYGZus{}CACHE\PYGZus{}MAX\PYGZus{}MB}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m}{200}
\PYG{n+nb}{export}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nv}{PYCYPHER\PYGZus{}RESULT\PYGZus{}CACHE\PYGZus{}TTL\PYGZus{}S}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m}{60}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Monitoring}
\PYG{n+nb}{export}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nv}{PYCYPHER\PYGZus{}SLOW\PYGZus{}QUERY\PYGZus{}MS}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m}{500}
\PYG{n+nb}{export}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nv}{PYCYPHER\PYGZus{}AUDIT\PYGZus{}LOG}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m}{1}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Multi\PYGZhy{}tenant rate limiting}
\PYG{n+nb}{export}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nv}{PYCYPHER\PYGZus{}RATE\PYGZus{}LIMIT\PYGZus{}QPS}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m}{50}
\PYG{n+nb}{export}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nv}{PYCYPHER\PYGZus{}RATE\PYGZus{}LIMIT\PYGZus{}BURST}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m}{100}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}
